name: gito-live-sports
description: Professional live sports streaming and sports management platform.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/backend
scripts.build:clean: node -e "const {rmSync}=require('node:fs'); const {join}=require('node:path'); ['packages/shared/dist','packages/shared/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo','apps/backend/dist','apps/backend/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo'].forEach(p => rmSync(join(process.cwd(), p), { force: true, recursive: true }));" && npm run build
